agent_runs.notes: Component architecture design document for the tactics-game project, detailing the unit's overview, attributes, abilities, and acceptance criteria.

Implemented a Python module defining the Component class for the tactics-game project. The class includes attributes for health, mana, spell power, and methods for taking damage, healing, casting spells, and checking alive status. Initialization validates input values, and spell casting validates mana availability. The design supports extensibility and aligns with the upstream component design document.
UI and visual notes for the Component in TacticsGame focus on clear identity, intuitive spellcasting feedback, and enhanced player readability.
